label: 1405j to 1405p Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 97–357, title III, § 30796 Stat. 1709Oct. 19, 1982
notes: Section 1405j, , , related to powers of municipal councils, exemption of members from liability for debate in council, and privilege from arrest.act June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1149 Stat. 1809
Section 1405k, , , related to appointment by each municipal council of members to serve on Municipal Committee and powers of Municipal Committee.act June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1249 Stat. 1809
Section 1405, , , related to time and place of meetings of each municipal council.lact June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1349 Stat. 1810

Section 1405m, , , related to introduction of bills in municipal councils by Governor, submission to councils of a budget of estimated receipts and expenditures, and submission of reports.act June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1449 Stat. 1810
Section 1405n, , , related to quorum of councils, vote on adoption of bills, and a journal of proceedings.act June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1549 Stat. 1810

Section 1405, , , related to acts of councils and assembly, approval or veto thereof by Governor, submission of repassed vetoed bills to the President, annulment of acts by Congress, and authorization of appropriations.oact June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1649 Stat. 1810

Section 1405p, , , related to vesting of voting franchise in residents of the Virgin Islands who are citizens of the United States and prescription by legislative assembly of additional qualifications.act June 22, 1936, ch. 699, § 1749 Stat. 1811
